mapper.sql: m.MASTER_NO, m.DOC_NO, m.BIZ_TITLE, m.WRITER_ID, m.DEPT_NO, m.POS_NAME, m.WRITER_NAME, m.CONTINENT_CODE, m.NATION_CODE, m.INFO_METHOD, m.PRO_STATE, m.PRO_STEP, m.BIZ_SECTION, m.BIZ_TYPE, m.BIZ_FORM, m.BIZ_FORMDETAIL, m.POWER_TYPE, m.S_LEVEL, m.INVEST_TYPE, m.BRANCH_YN, m.BIZ_REASON, m.AREA_CODE, m.UPDATE_DATE, TO_CHAR(m.REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, TO_CHAR(m.FINISH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FINISH_DATE
mapper.select:
SELECT , d.DEPT_NAME FROM BIZ_MASTER m LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON m.DEPT_NO = d.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND m.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT #{menuCode} || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || LPAD(TO_CHAR(NBM_MASTER_SEQ.NEXTVAL), 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BIZ_MASTER ( MASTER_NO, DOC_NO, BIZ_TITLE, WRITER_ID, DEPT_NO, POS_NAME, WRITER_NAME, CONTINENT_CODE, NATION_CODE, INFO_METHOD, PRO_STATE, PRO_STEP, REGI_DATE, BIZ_SECTION, BIZ_TYPE, BIZ_FORM, POWER_TYPE, INVEST_TYPE, BRANCH_YN, AREA_CODE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{docNo}, #{bizTitle}, #{writerId}, #{deptNo}, #{posName}, #{writerName}, #{continentCode}, #{nationCode}, #{infoMethod}, #{proState}, #{proStep}, SYSDATE, #{bizSection}, #{bizType}, #{bizForm}, #{powerType}, #{investType}, #{branchYn}, #{areaCode} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BIZ_MASTER SET DOC_NO = #{docNo}, BIZ_TITLE = #{bizTitle}, WRITER_ID = #{writerId}, DEPT_NO = #{deptNo}, POS_NAME = #{posName}, WRITER_NAME = #{writerName}, CONTINENT_CODE = #{continentCode}, NATION_CODE = #{nationCode}, INFO_METHOD = #{infoMethod}, BIZ_SECTION = #{bizSection}, BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType}, BIZ_FORM = #{bizForm}, POWER_TYPE = #{powerType}, BIZ_REASON = #{bizReason}, INVEST_TYPE = #{investType}, BRANCH_YN = #{branchYn}, AREA_CODE = #{areaCode}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
UPDATE BIZ_MASTER SET PRO_STEP = #{proStep}, PRO_STATE = #{proState}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO BIZ_PORTAL p USING DUAL ON (p.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND p.TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND p.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{writerId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( MASTER_NO, TASK_TYPE, TASK_CODE, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TASK_STATUS, UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID, TEMPLATE_CODE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{taskType}, #{taskCode}, SYSDATE, #{writerId}, #{taskStatus}, SYSDATE, #{writerId}, #{templateCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT BIZ_TYPE, TASK_CODE, TASK_NAME, TAKE_DAYS FROM BIZ_TASK WHERE BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType} AND TASK_CODE = #{taskCode}

SELECT BIZ_TYPE, TASK_CODE, VERSION, TASK_NAME, TAKE_DAYS, TO_CHAR(VERSION_UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS VERSION_UPDATE_DATE, VERSION_UPDATE_NAME, VERSION_UPDATE_USERID, CASE WHEN ABS(REGI_DATE - VERSION_UPDATE_DATE) < 5/86400 THEN 'Y' -- 등록 시각과 5초 이내 → 신규 등록 초기 이력 ELSE 'N' END AS IS_NEW_TASK FROM BIZ_TASK_HISTORY ORDER BY VERSION DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BIZ_TASK_HISTORY ( BIZ_TYPE, TASK_CODE, VERSION, TASK_NAME, TAKE_DAYS, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID, VERSION_UPDATE_DATE, VERSION_UPDATE_USERID, VERSION_UPDATE_NAME ) SELECT BIZ_TYPE, TASK_CODE, (SELECT NVL(MAX(VERSION), 0) + 1 FROM BIZ_TASK_HISTORY), TASK_NAME, TAKE_DAYS, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID, SYSDATE, #{writerId}, #{writerName} FROM BIZ_TASK WHERE BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType} AND TASK_CODE = #{taskCode}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BIZ_TASK T USING DUAL ON (T.BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType} AND T.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.TASK_NAME = #{taskName}, T.TAKE_DAYS = #{takeDays}, T.TEMPLATE_YN = #{templateYn}, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPWRITER_ID = #{writerId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BIZ_TYPE, TASK_CODE, TASK_NAME, TAKE_DAYS, TEMPLATE_YN, TEMPLATE_CODE, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID ) VALUES ( #{bizType}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{takeDays}, #{templateYn}, #{templateCode}, SYSDATE, #{writerId}, SYSDATE, #{writerId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BIZ_PORTAL_HISTORY ( MASTER_NO,TASK_TYPE,TASK_CODE , VERSION , PLN_START_DATE,PLN_TAKE_DAYS,PLN_END_DATE , PRF_START_DATE,PRF_TAKE_DAYS,PRF_END_DATE , LEAD_DAYS,DELAY_RATE,PREV_TASK,NEXT_TASK,TIP_DESC , TASK_STATUS,TEMPLATE_CODE , REGI_DATE,INWRITER_ID,UPDATE_DATE,UPWRITER_ID ) SELECT MASTER_NO,TASK_TYPE,TASK_CODE ,( SELECT NVL(MAX(VERSION) ,0) +1 FROM BIZ_PORTAL_HISTORY B WHERE A.MASTER_NO=B.MASTER_NO AND A.TASK_TYPE=B.TASK_TYPE AND A.TASK_CODE=B.TASK_CODE ) AS VERSION ,PLN_START_DATE,PLN_TAKE_DAYS,PLN_END_DATE ,PRF_START_DATE,PRF_TAKE_DAYS,PRF_END_DATE ,LEAD_DAYS,DELAY_RATE,PREV_TASK,NEXT_TASK,TIP_DESC ,TASK_STATUS,TEMPLATE_CODE, REGI_DATE,INWRITER_ID,UPDATE_DATE,UPWRITER_ID FROM BIZ_PORTAL A WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND TASK_CODE = #{taskCode}
mapper.select: /* selectBizTaskTypeList 관련자료 조회용 콤보 : 1차분류(TASK_TYPE) */ SELECT DISTINCT A.MASTER_NO , A.TASK_TYPE AS VALUE , A.TASK_TYPE_NAME AS TEXT , ( SELECT bm.BIZ_TITLE FROM BIZ_MASTER bm WHERE bm.MASTER_NO=A.MASTER_NO ) AS BIZ_TITLE FROM ( SELECT A.MASTER_NO , A.TASK_TYPE -- '109'(사내절차)는 코드그룹명 없으므로 하드코딩 , CASE WHEN A.TASK_TYPE='109' THEN '사내절차' ELSE CM.CODE_GROUP_NAME END TASK_TYPE_NAME FROM BIZ_PORTAL A INNER JOIN COME_CODE_GROUP CM ON A.TASK_TYPE=CM.CODE_GROUP INNER JOIN BIZ_TASK CMD ON A.TASK_TYPE=CMD.BIZ_TYPE AND A.TASK_CODE=CMD.TASK_CODE AND CMD.TEMPLATE_YN='N' WHERE A.MASTER_NO=#{masterNo} AND A.TASK_STATUS!='C' ) A ORDER BY A.MASTER_NO, A.TASK_TYPE

/* selectBizTaskCodeList 관련자료 조회용 콤보 : 2차분류(TASK_CODE) */ SELECT A.MASTER_NO , A.TASK_TYPE , A.TASK_TYPE_NAME , A.TASK_CODE , A.TASK_CODE_ORD , A.TASK_NAME , A.TASK_TYPE||A.TASK_CODE AS VALUE , '[ '||A.TASK_TYPE_NAME||' ]'||A.TASK_NAME AS TEXT , ( SELECT bm.BIZ_TITLE FROM BIZ_MASTER bm WHERE bm.MASTER_NO=A.MASTER_NO ) AS BIZ_TITLE FROM ( SELECT A.MASTER_NO , A.TASK_TYPE -- '109'(사내절차)는 코드그룹명 없으므로 하드코딩 , CASE WHEN A.TASK_TYPE='109' THEN '사내절차' ELSE CM.CODE_GROUP_NAME END TASK_TYPE_NAME , A.TASK_CODE -- 정렬용 가상 컬럼: S→A 변환, D→B 변환으로 S→D 순서 보장 , CASE WHEN A.TASK_TYPE='109' AND SUBSTR(A.TASK_CODE,1,1)='S' THEN 'A'||SUBSTR(A.TASK_CODE,2,LENGTH(A.TASK_CODE)-1 ) WHEN A.TASK_TYPE='109' AND SUBSTR(A.TASK_CODE,1,1)='D' THEN 'B'||SUBSTR(A.TASK_CODE,2,LENGTH(A.TASK_CODE)-1 ) ELSE A.TASK_CODE END TASK_CODE_ORD , CMD.TASK_NAME -- 2차분류 태스크명 FROM BIZ_PORTAL A INNER JOIN COME_CODE_GROUP CM ON A.TASK_TYPE=CM.CODE_GROUP INNER JOIN BIZ_TASK CMD ON A.TASK_TYPE=CMD.BIZ_TYPE AND A.TASK_CODE=CMD.TASK_CODE AND CMD.TEMPLATE_YN='N' WHERE A.MASTER_NO=#{masterNo} AND A.TASK_STATUS!='C' ) A ORDER BY A.MASTER_NO, A.TASK_TYPE, A.TASK_CODE_ORD

SELECT A.MASTER_NO , A.TASK_TYPE , A.TASK_CODE , A.VERSION||' ('||TO_CHAR(A.UPDATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')||')' AS VERSION , A.PLN_START_DATE , A.PLN_TAKE_DAYS , A.PLN_END_DATE , A.PRF_START_DATE , A.PRF_TAKE_DAYS , A.PRF_END_DATE , A.LEAD_DAYS , A.DELAY_RATE , A.TIP_DESC , A.UPDATE_DATE AS MOD_TIME , A.UPWRITER_ID AS MOD_USER , B.NAME AS MOD_USER_NM , ( SELECT bm.BIZ_TITLE FROM BIZ_MASTER bm WHERE bm.MASTER_NO=A.MASTER_NO ) AS BIZ_TITLE FROM BIZ_PORTAL_HISTORY A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.UPWRITER_ID=B.EMPNO WHERE A.MASTER_NO=#{masterNo} AND A.TASK_TYPE=#{taskType} AND A.TASK_CODE=#{taskCode} ORDER BY A.VERSION DESC
